improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace for business owners and traders. Powered by Claude. Start with 3 free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/images/gideon-og-preview.png"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Voice chat, instant answers, professional support. Try free today.">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the value proposition and free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, and Twitter—critical for B2B audiences who discover tools through social sharing. Including the pricing and free searches creates urgency and sets expectations before the click.

improvements.suggestion:
Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant

Meet Gideon — get instant answers, voice chat support, and a professional workspace built for business owners and traders. Try three searches free, then unlock unlimited access.
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately communicates what Gideon is (AI assistant for trade/business) and who it serves. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) and makes the free trial offer clear without being pushy. The copy avoids unverifiable claims while establishing credibility through specificity.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a GDN AI member. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, giving you unlimited access to Gideon's voice chat, your own members workspace, and professional trade and business support—billed monthly or annually with 30 percent savings on annual plans.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in a freemium model: what happens at the paywall. By clearly explaining the transition and immediately restating value and pricing, it reduces uncertainty, builds trust, and nudges visitors toward conversion.
